summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No GitHub mutations are planned because this shard has no shared canonical, merge/fix actions are blocked by job frontmatter, low-signal closeout is disabled, and most items require maintainer review rather than dedupe closure. One item is routed to central security handling because hydrated PR evidence includes GHSA/security-boundary media-trust bypass signals. Five listed candidates were not hydrated in the preflight artifact and need live state before classification.
